elements.title: beans on toast
elements.contents: ... that beans on toast (example pictured) have variously been referred to as "skinheads", "skins on a raft" and "cowboy's dinner"?

elements.title: Licia Fertz
elements.contents: ... that Licia Fertz posed nude for Rolling Stone at the age of 89?

elements.title: Your Own Quiz
elements.contents: ... that the author of Your Own Quiz wanted the readers to answer at least one question in the novel correctly at the same time as the main character?

elements.title: all three sons of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip
elements.contents: ... that all three sons of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip attended Gordonstoun School?

elements.title: 44 West 77th Street
elements.contents: ... that one writer described the decorations of 44 West 77th Street as having seemingly been "squeezed out of a pastry tube"?

elements.title: Kino-Eye
elements.contents: ... that the documentary film Kino-Eye includes footage reversed by director Dziga Vertov to show bread being unmade and a bull being "resurrected"?

elements.title: Patrick Castagno
elements.contents: ... that Patrick Castagno won his 60th state championship shortly after his 60th birthday?

elements.title: Gordon House
elements.contents: ... that the Gordon House was the headquarters of a project to rebuild an 1813 ship?

elements.title: Vasily Baranshchikov
elements.contents: ... that Vasily Baranshchikov's travelogue was an 18th-century bestseller, despite what one contemporary review deemed sloppy writing and an ungrateful, whiny tone?
